name: RSMeans City Cost Index (CCI) — Regional Localization
edition: Current annual release (published Jan each year; quarterly updates for Material and Labor)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that apply the RSMeans City Cost Index to localise national average unit prices, validate that the chosen city + ZIP3 are within the CCI coverage (720+ US cities + ~80 Canadian cities), confirm the index period currency (must be within 12 months for unit costs, 24 for installed costs), enforce material/labor/equipment factor application, and flag estimates that diverge from indexed benchmarks beyond a configurable band.
metrics_referenced: Total Index, Material Index, Labor Index, Equipment Index, Installed Index — all relative to 30-city average = 100.0
